# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.
# Category: edge_computing_security

```typescript
import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.208.0/http/server.ts";

const kv = await Deno.openKv();

interface User {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  email: string;
  age: number;
  city: string;
  country: string;
  role: string;
  status: string;
  createdAt: string;
}

interface Product {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  category: string;
  price: number;
  stock: number;
  brand: string;
  tags: string[];
}

interface Order {
  id: string;
  userId: string;
  productId: string;
  quantity: number;
  status: string;
  total: number;
  createdAt: string;
}

async function handleCreateUser(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const user: User = await req.json();
  
  await kv.set(["users", user.id], user);
  await kv.set(["users", "by_email", user.email], user.id);
  await kv.set(["users", "by_city", user.city, user.id], user);
  await kv.set(["users", "by_country", user.country, user.id], user);
  await kv.set(["users", "by_role", user.role, user.id], user);
  await kv.set(["users", "by_status", user.status, user.id], user);
  
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(user), {
    status: 201,
    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
  });
}

async function handleCreateProduct(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const product: Product = await req.json();
  
  await kv.set(["products", product.id], product);
  await kv.set(["products", "by_category", product.category, product.id], product);
  await kv.set(["products", "by_brand", product.brand, product.id], product);
  
  for (const tag of product.tags) {
    await kv.set(["products", "by_tag", tag, product.id], product);
  }
  
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(product), {
    status: 201,
    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
  });
}

async function handleCreateOrder(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const order: Order = await req.json();
  
  await kv.set(["orders", order.id], order);
  await kv.set(["orders", "by_user", order.userId, order.id], order);
  await kv.set(["orders", "by_product", order.productId, order.id], order);
  await kv.set(["orders", "by_status", order.status, order.id], order);
  
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(order), {
    status: 201,
    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
  });
}

async function handleSearchUsers(url: URL): Promise<Response> {
  const params = url.searchParams;
  const userId = params.get("id");
  const email = params.get("email");
  const city = params.get("city");
  const country = params.get("country");
  const role = params.get("role");
  const status = params.get("status");
  const minAge = params.get("minAge");
  const maxAge = params.get("maxAge");
  const limit = parseInt(params.get("limit") || "100");

  const results: User[] = [];

  if (userId) {
    const entry = await kv.get<User>(["users", userId]);
    if (entry.value) {
      results.push(entry.value);
    }
  } else if (email) {
    const idEntry = await kv.get<string>(["users", "by_email", email]);
    if (idEntry.value) {
      const userEntry = await kv.get<User>(["users", idEntry.value]);
      if (userEntry.value) {
        results.push(userEntry.value);
      }
    }
  } else if (city) {
    const prefix = ["users", "by_city", city];
    const entries = kv.list<User>({ prefix });
    for await (const entry of entries) {
      const userId = entry.key[entry.key.length - 1] as string;
      const userEntry = await kv.get<User>(["users", userId]);
      if (userEntry.value) {
        results.push(userEntry.value);
      }
      if (results.length >= limit) break;
    }
  } else if (country) {
    const prefix = ["users", "by_country", country];
    const entries = kv.list<User>({ prefix });
    for await (const entry of entries) {
      const userId = entry.key[entry.key.length - 1] as string;
      const userEntry = await kv.get<User>(["users", userId]);
      if (userEntry.value) {
        results.push(userEntry.value);
      }
      if (results.length >= limit) break;
    }
  } else if (role) {
    const prefix = ["users", "by_role", role];
    const entries = kv.list<User>({ prefix });
    for await (const entry of entries) {
      const userId = entry.key[entry.key.length - 1] as string;
      const userEntry = await kv.get<User>(["users", userId]);
      if (userEntry.value) {
        results.push(userEntry.value);
      }
      if (results.length >= limit) break;
    }
  } else if (status) {
    const prefix = ["users", "by_status", status];
    const entries = kv.list<User>({ prefix });
    for await (const entry of entries) {
      const userId = entry.key[entry.key.length - 1] as string;
      const userEntry = await kv.get<User>(["users", userId]);
      if (userEntry.value) {
        results.push(userEntry.value);
      }
      if (results.length >= limit) break;
    }
  } else {
    const prefix = ["users"];
    const entries = kv.list<User>({ prefix });
    for await (const entry of entries) {
      if (entry.key.length === 2 && typeof entry.key[1] === "string") {
        if (entry.value) {
          results.push(entry.value);
        }
        if (results.length >= limit) break;
      }
    }
  }

  let filteredResults = results;

  if (minAge) {
    const minAgeNum = parseInt(minAge);
    filteredResults = filteredResults.filter(u => u.age >= minAgeNum);
  }

  if (maxAge) {
    const maxAgeNum = parseInt(maxAge);
    filteredResults = filteredResults.filter(u => u.age <= maxAgeNum);
  }

  return new Response(JSON.stringify({ results: filteredResults, count: filteredResults.length }), {
    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
  });
}

async function handleSearchProducts(url: URL): Promise<Response> {
  const params = url.searchParams;
  const productId = params.get("id");
  const category = params.get("category");
  const brand = params.get("brand");
  const tag = params.get("tag");
  const minPrice = params.get("minPrice");
  const maxPrice = params.get("maxPrice");
  const inStock = params.get("inStock");
  const limit = parseInt(params.get("limit") || "100");

  const results: Product[] = [];

  if (productId) {
    const entry = await kv.get<Product>(["products", productId]);
    if (entry.value) {
      results.push(entry.value);
    }
  } else if (category) {
    const prefix = ["products", "by_category", category];
    const entries = kv.list<Product>({ prefix });
    for await (const entry of entries) {
      if (entry.value) {
        results.push(entry.value);
      }
      if (results.length >= limit) break;
    }
  } else if (brand) {
    const prefix = ["products", "by_brand", brand];
    const entries = kv.list<Product>({ prefix });
    for await (const entry of entries) {
      if (entry.value) {
        results.push(entry.value);
      }
      if (results.length >= limit) break;
    }
  } else if (tag) {
    const prefix = ["products", "by_tag", tag];
    const entries = kv.list<Product>({ prefix });
    for await (const entry of entries) {
      if (entry.value) {
        results.push(entry.value);
      }
      if (results.length >= limit) break;
    }
  } else {
    const prefix = ["products"];
    const entries = kv.list<Product>({ prefix });
    for await (const entry of entries) {
      if (entry.key.length === 2 && typeof entry.key[1] === "string") {
        if (entry.value) {
          results.push(entry.value);
        }
        if (results.length >= limit) break;
      }
    }
  }

  let filteredResults = results;

  if (minPrice) {
    const minPriceNum = parseFloat(minPrice);
    filteredResults = filteredResults.filter(p => p.price >= minPriceNum);
  }

  if (maxPrice) {
    const maxPriceNum = parseFloat(maxPrice);
    filteredResults = filteredResults.filter(p => p.price <= maxPriceNum);
  }

  if (inStock === "true") {
    filteredResults = filteredResults.filter(p => p.stock > 0);
  }

  return new Response(JSON.stringify({ results: filteredResults, count: filteredResults.length }), {
    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
  });
}

async function handleSearchOrders(url: URL): Promise<Response> {
  const params = url.searchParams;
  const orderId = params.get("id");
  const userId = params.get("userId");
  const productId = params.get("productId");
  const status = params.get("status");
  const minTotal = params.get("minTotal");
  const maxTotal = params.get("maxTotal");
  const limit = parseInt(params.get("limit") || "100");

  const results: Order[] = [];

  if (orderId) {
    const entry = await kv.get<Order>(["orders", orderId]);
    if (entry.value) {
      results.push(entry.value);
    }
  } else if (userId) {
    const prefix = ["orders", "by_user", userId];
    const entries = kv.list<Order>({ prefix });
    for await (const entry of entries) {
      if (entry.value) {
        results.push(entry.value);
      }
      if (results.length >= limit) break;
    }
  } else if (productId) {
    const prefix = ["orders", "by_product", productId];
    const entries = kv.list<Order>({ prefix });
    for await (const entry of entries) {
      if (entry.value) {
        results.push(entry.value);
      }
      if (results.length >= limit) break;
    }
  } else if (status) {
    const prefix = ["orders", "by_status", status];
    const entries = kv.list<Order>({ prefix });
    for await (const entry of entries) {
      if (entry.value) {
        results.push(entry.value);
      }
      if (results.length >= limit) break;
    }
  } else {
    const prefix = ["orders"];
    const entries = kv.list<Order>({ prefix });
    for await (const entry of entries) {
      if (entry.key.length === 2 && typeof entry.key[1] === "string") {
        if (entry.value) {
          results.push(entry.value);
        }
        if (results.length >= limit) break;
      }
    }
  }

  let filteredResults = results;

  if (minTotal) {
    const minTotalNum = parseFloat(minTotal);
    filteredResults = filteredResults.filter(o => o.total >= minTotalNum);
  }

  if (maxTotal) {
    const maxTotalNum = parseFloat(maxTotal);
    filteredResults = filteredResults.filter(o => o.total <= maxTotalNum);
  }

  return new Response(JSON.stringify({ results: filteredResults, count: filteredResults.length }), {
    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
  });
}

async function handleGetUser(userId: string): Promise<Response> {
  const entry = await kv.get<User>(["users", userId]);
  
  if (!entry.value) {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "User not found" }), {
      status: 404,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  }
  
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(entry.value), {
    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
  });
}

async function handleUpdateUser(userId: string, req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const updates: Partial<User> = await req.json();
  const entry = await kv.get<User>(["users", userId]);
  
  if (!entry.value) {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "User not found" }), {
      status: 404,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  }
  
  const oldUser = entry.value;
  const updatedUser = { ...oldUser, ...updates };
  
  if (oldUser.email !== updatedUser.email) {
    await kv.delete(["users", "by_email", oldUser.email]);
    await kv.set(["users", "by_email", updatedUser.email], userId);
  }
  
  if (oldUser.city !== updatedUser.city) {
    await kv.delete(["users", "by_city", oldUser.city, userId]);
    await kv.set(["users", "by_city", updatedUser.city, userId], updatedUser);
  }
  
  if (oldUser.country !== updatedUser.country) {
    await kv.delete(["users", "by_country", oldUser.country, userId]);
    await kv.set(["users", "by_country", updatedUser.country, userId], updatedUser);
  }
  
  if (oldUser.role !== updatedUser.role) {
    await kv.delete(["users", "by_role", oldUser.role, userId]);
    await kv.set(["users", "by_role", updatedUser.role, userId], updatedUser);
  }
  
  if (oldUser.status !== updatedUser.status) {
    await kv.delete(["users", "by_status", oldUser.status, userId]);
    await kv.set(["users", "by_status", updatedUser.status, userId], updatedUser);
  }
  
  await kv.set(["users", userId], updatedUser);
  
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(updatedUser), {
    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
  });
}

async function handleDeleteUser(userId: string): Promise<Response> {
  const entry = await kv.get<User>(["users", userId]);
  
  if (!entry.value) {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "User not found" }), {
      status: 404,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  }
  
  const user = entry.value;
  
  await kv.delete(["users", userId]);
  await kv.delete(["users", "by_email", user
